title: Video by theredmike
description: A presenter holding a branded "The Red Mike" microphone speaks to camera while walking through a daytime crowd on a tree-lined road. Cutaways show a stage with a banner reading "PEACEFUL PROTEST" and text naming Dharmendra Pradhan alongside the word "RESIGN", people holding Indian flags and placards, and an umbrella raised over the crowd. Posted 20 June 2026, a month before the 20 July march; the location shown is not independently confirmed. This is a media outlet piece rather than participant footage.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - क्रांति की गूँज दिल्ली में दस्तक दे चुकी हैं ...  और थोड़ी देर में सं...
description: A large crowd walks along a divided multi-lane road lined with trees and metal median railings, filmed from within the crowd. Indian tricolour flags are carried near the front; some participants raise a closed fist. Cars, an autorickshaw and a bus are visible at the roadside. The clip carries an overlay reading "Yuva Shakti Zindabad!!". Posted 20 July 2026; the specific road is not identified in the footage.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - गुलामी अगर आदत बन जाये तो आजादी सिर्फ एक सपना रह जाती है !  20 जुलाई ...
description: A daytime sit-in under yellow tarpaulin shelters. People sit on mats among spread-out books; one person massages another’s legs. A hand-lettered placard reads "1929 BHAGAT SINGH JAIL PROTEST" and a banner behind the group reads "HUNGER STRIKE DAY 20". Handwritten signs in Hindi and a "Writing Workshop" sign are propped among the books. A standing crowd watches from behind. The clip carries an overlay reading "1929 Yaad aa gya". Posted 18 July 2026.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - बेटी बचाओ बेटी पढ़ाओ !!  ऐसा बर्ताव तो नार्थ कोरिया में भी नहीं होता ...
description: Uniformed personnel in khaki with yellow helmets stand among a crowd at a green metal barricade. Several take hold of individuals in the crowd; one person is pulled across the barricade. In a later shot an officer swings a cane. A young man is then filmed speaking into a channel-branded microphone. Faces of both civilians and officers are identifiable. Overlay text in Hindi-English criticises the government. Posted 21 July 2026; the depicted events are consistent with the 20 July march but the date and location are inferred from the post, not independently confirmed.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - इनका अहंकार तो देखो जैसे देश के बच्चे कोई खिलौना हो , जो इनको इनके बा...
description: On a city street outside a building signed "Bank of Baroda", several men in civilian clothes hold and carry lathis (long canes); at least one uniformed officer is present in the same frames. People move and scatter across the road; some are seated on a kerb. The clip carries an overlay asserting "Fake police attack on public with no reason". What is visible is men in civilian dress holding canes alongside uniformed police; whether they are impersonators, plainclothes officers, or otherwise is not established by the footage, and the claim is publicly disputed. Marked context-unclear on that basis.

title: Video by realtaplu
description: Instagram reel posted by @𝗖𝗼𝗰𝗸𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵 𝗝𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘆 on 2026-07-20. Footage not yet reviewed or described; awaiting editorial review.

title: Video by sundaysarthak
description: Instagram reel posted by @Sarthak Goswami on 2026-07-21. Footage not yet reviewed or described; awaiting editorial review.

title: Video by natureofnagpur
description: A compilation clip overlaid with the caption "STUDENTS BLACK DAY, 20 July 2026." Opens on an empty road with a yellow barricade cart near a college gate as police move toward a crowd; a following shot shows a woman with a visible red mark on her shoulder, wearing a face mask, being helped by others. A later clip shows young people, including one in a striped jersey holding a green placard, standing near police in riot gear, with an on-screen caption reading "Hum apke bache nhi hai?" ("Aren't we your children?").

title: Video by filmyshit
description: An edited compilation with meme-style captions and music. Shows a crowd near a line of police visible through trees; a placard from a Shiv Sena-affiliated youth wing reads in Marathi "देशातल्या न्याय झाला पाहिजे!" ("there must be justice in the country"). Other clips show people massing near police under trees with umbrellas raised and an orange party flag held aloft. On-screen text overlays ("POLICE KO AAGE KARTA HAI!", "SORCERER") indicate editorial commentary rather than a straight, unedited clip.

title: Video by viepsa
description: First-person selfie video. The filmer, wearing eye protection and a wet cloth mask, says in Hindi that tear gas has been used again and that people have scattered ("फिर से टीयर गैस कर दिया। फिर से। ये सब लोग भाग गए हैं"). A following clip shows a close view of a reddened mark on someone's back under a white cloth with the on-screen caption "They just beat the living shit out of us," then a distressed woman with a cloth wrapped around her neck speaking directly to camera, saying in Hindi "बाहर आओ तुमको पता लगेगा कि तुम डेमोक्रेसी में नहीं रहते हो" ("Come outside, you'll find out you're not living in a democracy").

title: Video by womanwithopinions
description: Handheld footage from within a dense crowd pushing against and climbing over a yellow barricade stencilled "DELHI P[OLICE]"; people scuffle with personnel near the barricade while one person wipes the rail with a white cloth. An Indian tricolour and a saffron flag are held above the crowd. An earlier clip shows a person in a dark shirt and white trousers making a throwing gesture toward a line of personnel in light-blue uniforms near yellow-and-black roadside barriers.

title: Video by ankita.pahwa
description: Before/after style compilation. The first clip, captioned "*what we wanted to do*," shows a dense crowd of marchers filling a tree-lined street. The second, captioned "*what they turned it into*," shows the crowd pressed against a line of police at a barricade, people shouting and gesturing. The final clip shows a man sitting on the ground with a bleeding head wound being held upright by another person as bystanders look on.

source.uploader: Ankita | Sustainable Fashion, Clean Beauty & Life as it is | UGC

title: Video by sunny_trn_khediwal
description: Short clip captioned "Delhi Police ने मार मार कर सर फोड़ दिया" ("Delhi Police beat him repeatedly and split his head open"). Shows a young man sitting on the ground being attended to by others, one pressing a cloth to the back of his head, a small crowd gathered under a yellow canopy, and a bystander filming on a phone.

title: Video by kishhhh_20
description: Clip captioned "Media is hiding the truth. Watch the real story here!" Shows a man in a white t-shirt heavily stained with blood being supported and walked by two others through a crowd on a wide, tree-lined road, with onlookers gathered on a raised roadside berm in the background. A later clip shows people milling on a wet street.

title: Video by theharrykazama
description: A single continuous close-up selfie video filmed at night: a young man wearing glasses speaks at length directly to camera, captioned "Cowardly government." No crowd, march, or police are shown on screen; the clip is a first-person monologue rather than footage of the protest scene itself.

title: Video by aawaazunfiltered
description: Branded 'Awaz Unfiltered' compilation. Captioned "This Is How They Went," the first clip shows a column of marchers walking down a tree-lined road with fists raised. Captioned "This Is What They Got," the second shows people sitting or kneeling on the road while personnel in police/RAF uniform stand over them; a bystander hands a water bottle to someone seated on the ground.

title: Video by _meme_machiine_
description: Sideways-oriented clip showing a row of yellow police barricades along a street, thick haze drifting across the scene, and a building with a red digital sign visible behind trees. The uploader's caption reads "Delhi Police block metro NEET protest" and references Jantar Mantar.

title: Video by harsh.chawla14
description: A person holding a microphone stands facing a line of paramilitary/police personnel in camouflage uniform with riot shields, in front of a red-brick building. On-screen text quotes a source saying, "Police had no name badges & charged laathis on protestors."

title: Video by parth.mn1991
description: A man in a light green t-shirt with wet, disheveled hair speaks animatedly to someone off-camera near a tall black perimeter fence topped with barbed wire, a red sandstone-style building visible behind it. The uploader's caption describes him as "another protestor with blood on his tshirt" and places the clip at Jantar Mantar, Delhi. A second young man beside him has a mark on his forehead.

title: Video by sadhika_tiwari
description: A young man wearing a lav microphone speaks unsteadily to an interviewer while gripping his own shoulder, his hair wet, standing on a tree-lined path. The uploader's caption identifies him as a 16-year-old protester who was "lathi charged by Delhi police" and says he was shaking and in shock but refused to leave the protest site.

title: Video by rajbarodiyareel
description: A reaction/commentary clip responding to a screenshotted tweet claiming protesters ("Cockroaches") pelted stones at police and attacked them, justifying a lathi charge, shown alongside a News India TV screenshot reading (Hindi) "Clash at Jantar Mantar" over a CJP demonstration. The filmer, captioned "How can you be so predictable???", disputes the framing and re-shares a clip from another Instagram account showing men gathered near a parked van.

title: Video by harshdelhise
description: A person narrates to camera while walking along a colonnaded street resembling Connaught Place, with a line of RAF personnel in blue camouflage, helmets, and riot shields visible moving past in the background.

title: Video by sushil24_rajput
description: Nighttime footage captioned "JANTAR MANTAR PROTEST, 20th July (8pm)." A young man in a purple shirt shouts and gestures animatedly next to a parked motorbike amid a dense, agitated crowd; bystanders film on phones nearby.

title: Video by mukul.singh.chauhan
description: Split-screen clip: the top half shows a dense crowd around a man with a bleeding cut above his eye, someone pointing at the wound while others raise their fists nearby; the bottom half shows a man sitting in a car with a "PRESS" sign visible in the rear window, speaking to camera. The uploader's caption asks (Hindi), "What kind of crowd management is it to split someone's head open?"

title: Video by psycophilosopher
description: A screen recording of a news broadcast (studio anchor, split-screen with a fire truck and police at a scene) captioned (Hindi) "हिंसक प्रदर्शन में लगभग 50 पुलिसवाले..." ("In the violent protest, nearly 50 policemen [hurt]..."), followed by an indoor commentary segment in a room decorated with political posters, overlaying a Malcolm X quote about media framing ("If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing") while criticizing the coverage.

title: Video by boomlive_in
description: A BOOM fact-check explainer responding to a Delhi Police tweet that called a viral clip of "batons fitted with nails" fake and unrelated to the protest. BOOM says a forensic metadata check on the original file placed the recording at Gate No. 3, Janpath Metro Station with a timestamp of 20 July, and that its source (kept anonymous) confirmed attending that day's protest.
location: Janpath Metro Station, New Delhi, India

title: Video by cockroachjantaparty
description: A TV news clip, credited on-screen to Lokmat, showing a police officer inside a vehicle telling two young men "I will put 50-50gm powder in pocket if I see you again," captioned by the broadcaster as a cop threatening young protesters. The on-screen Marathi headline frames it as Mumbai police accused of behaving "like the British."

title: Video by disha_ramteke05
description: Night-time footage overlaid with the caption "Nagpur Police" showing a woman in a red outfit pinned face-down on the pavement while an officer's leg presses against her back; a second clip shows a crowd pressed against a metal shutter. Posted with the hashtags #nagpur and #savidhanchowknagpur.

title: Video by aanu_06_05
description: Footage filmed from behind a wall and tree line, overlaid with the text "Gundagardi At its Peak," showing riot police standing by parked buses amid haze on the road, with a large crowd visible further down the street. Posted with the hashtags #cockroachjantaparty #sonamwangchuk #jantarmantarprotest.

title: Baton charge and tear gas as protesters try to reach Parliament
description: Police brutality on protesters trying to reach sansad.

title: Delhi Police stand over injured protester as crowd shouts "They killed him"
description: This video shows delhi police beating a student protestor  during the peaceful protest demanding Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation due to paper leaks

title: "Who is the stone-thrower?" — street clash filmed from a distance
description: This video shows a clip from the 20th July protest where police started throwing stones at the peaceful student protestors

title: Witness account of police action at the 20 July protest
description: This video shows a media person telling the exact situation of what happened at the protest on 20th July 2026 and how the police became violent
